data.content:
Implementation pushed.

Branch: worktree-foolery-a01f-opencode-render
Commit: d569c4f8

Files changed:
- NEW src/lib/opencode-event-translate.ts (370 lines): pure translateOpenCodePart / translateOpenCodeEvent / translateOpenCodeResponse / hasOpenCodeMessagePayload. Handles step-start, text, step-finish, tool (running and completed → tool_use + tool_result), reasoning, file, snapshot. SSE envelopes: permission.{asked,updated}, message.part.updated, message.updated, step.updated, session.idle, session.error.
- src/lib/opencode-http-session.ts: 488 → 402 lines after extraction. Adds emittedToolUseIds / emittedToolResultIds dedupe Sets so streaming tool parts emit at most one tool_use and one tool_result per call id even when OpenCode pushes pending → running → completed transitions.
- src/lib/agent-adapter-normalizers.ts: createOpenCodeNormalizer now handles tool_use → assistant tool_use block, tool_result → user tool_result block, reasoning → stream_event delta, session_error → result(is_error: true). Existing text/step_start/step_finish behavior preserved.
- NEW src/lib/opencode-event-format.ts: formatOpenCodeEvent for native lifecycle types (reasoning, step_updated, session_idle, session_error, file, snapshot, message_updated). tool_use / tool_result deliberately fall through to the existing Claude-shape renderers (formatAssistantEvent / formatToolResult).
- src/lib/terminal-manager-format.ts: wires formatOpenCodeEvent into formatStreamEvent right after formatCodexEvent.

Tests added (all hermetic, run under bun run test):
- src/lib/__tests__/opencode-event-translate.test.ts (27 tests)
- src/lib/__tests__/agent-adapter-opencode.test.ts (10 tests)
- src/lib/__tests__/opencode-event-format.test.ts (12 tests)
- src/lib/__tests__/opencode-pipeline-smoke.test.ts (3 tests) — feeds a representative SSE-and-message stream through the full pipeline (translate → normalize → format) and asserts the rendered terminal text contains tool name + command (▶ bash + ls -la /tmp), tool output (drwxr-xr-x...), reasoning, and assistant message.

Quality gates (in worktree):
- bun run lint: clean.
- bunx tsc --noEmit: clean.
- bun run test: 294 files / 2965 tests passed (49 new).
- bun run build: succeeded.

Operational evidence: PORT=3071 bun run dev started cleanly, /api/version returned {ok:true,...} with the new code loaded. Full UI-level OpenCode dispatch test deferred to the user's a96c environment (which is the bug they originally reported — once they pull this branch they will see tool calls, reasoning, and assistant text in the terminal pane that today shows essentially nothing).
